title: Dependabot can't parse your go.mod
body:
Dependabot couldn't parse the go.mod found at `/go.mod`.

The error Dependabot encountered was:

```
go: github.com/openshift/api@v3.9.1-0.20190810003144-27fb16909b15+incompatible: invalid pseudo-version: preceding tag (v3.9.0) not found
```

[View the update logs](https://app.dependabot.com/accounts/containers/update-logs/18509804).

comments.body:
I also get this error when trying to run ` go build` in:

https://github.com/containers/libpod

``` 
olehermanse@ohfedora libpod $ go build
go: github.com/containers/buildah@v1.12.0 requires
	github.com/openshift/api@v3.9.1-0.20190810003144-27fb16909b15+incompatible: invalid pseudo-version: preceding tag (v3.9.0) not found
```
Let's keep the discussion over at https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/4728
